tool_input.command:
# Try to dump what we can and recreate
sqlite3 htmlgraph.db ".dump" 2>/dev/null > /tmp/htmlgraph_dump.sql && echo "Dump succeeded: $(wc -l < /tmp/htmlgraph_dump.sql) lines" || echo "Dump failed, trying .recover" && sqlite3 htmlgraph.db ".recover" > /tmp/htmlgraph_recover.sql 2>/dev/null && echo "Recover succeeded: $(wc -l < /tmp/htmlgraph_recover.sql) lines"

tool_input.command:
# Check row counts in the healthy "corrupt" file
sqlite3 /Users/shakes/DevProjects/htmlgraph/.htmlgraph/htmlgraph.db.corrupt "
SELECT 'sessions' as tbl, COUNT(*) FROM sessions
UNION ALL SELECT 'agent_events', COUNT(*) FROM agent_events
UNION ALL SELECT 'features', COUNT(*) FROM features
UNION ALL SELECT 'task_delegation', COUNT(*) FROM task_delegation;
" 2>&1
tool_input.description: Check row counts in healthy DB
